items.line_en: Hello my dear friends, welcome to Learn Simple English with 3D Animation YouTube channel.

coach.say: Hello my dear friends, welcome to Learn Simple English with 3D Animation YouTube channel.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hello my dear friends, / welcome to Learn Simple English with 3D Animation YouTube channel.

items.line_en: I'm here to see Dr. Michel Anderson.

coach.say: I'm here to see Dr. Michel Anderson.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I'm here to see Dr. / Michel Anderson.

items.line_en: Your name, please sir.

coach.say: Your name, please sir.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Your name, / please sir.

items.line_en: I'm a Senka Indrajit Karunadasa.

coach.say: I'm a Senka Indrajit Karunadasa.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I'm a Senka Indrajit Karunadasa.

items.line_en: Yes, please fill out this form with your name, address and phone number.

coach.say: Yes, please fill out this form with your name, address and phone number.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Yes, / please fill out this form with your name, / address and phone number.

items.line_en: Do you have health insurance?

coach.say: Do you have health insurance?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Do you have health insurance?

items.line_en: No, I don't have a health insurance.

coach.say: No, I don't have a health insurance.
coach.hint: Chunk it: No, / I don't have a health insurance.

items.line_en: Will there be a problem?

coach.say: Will there be a problem?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Will there be a problem?

items.line_en: I don't think so.

coach.say: I don't think so.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I don't think so / .

items.line_en: Stay here.

coach.say: Stay here.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Stay here.

items.line_en: Dr. Michael will be right with you.

coach.say: Dr. Michael will be right with you.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Dr. / Michael will be right with you.

items.line_en: What seems to be the problem?

coach.say: What seems to be the problem?
coach.hint: Chunk it: What seems to be the problem?

items.line_en: Well, I cut myself with a sharp knife the other day and now my hand is swollen.

coach.say: Well, I cut myself with a sharp knife the other day and now my hand is swollen.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Well, / I cut myself with a sharp knife the other day and now my hand is swollen.

items.line_en: It seems to be infected.

coach.say: It seems to be infected.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It seems to be infected.

items.line_en: When did this happen?

coach.say: When did this happen?
coach.hint: Chunk it: When did this happen?

items.line_en: Last Sunday, Dr. Can you wrote up your sleeve?

coach.say: Last Sunday, Dr. Can you wrote up your sleeve?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Last Sunday, / Dr. / Can you wrote up your sleeve?

items.line_en: Does it hurt when I press here?

coach.say: Does it hurt when I press here?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Does it hurt when / I press here?

items.line_en: A little bit Dr. It hurts when I shake my hand.

coach.say: A little bit Dr. It hurts when I shake my hand.
coach.hint: Chunk it: A little bit Dr. / It hurts when I shake my hand.

items.line_en: Have you been taking any medication?

coach.say: Have you been taking any medication?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Have you been taking any medication?

items.line_en: No. Do you have a fever?

coach.say: No. Do you have a fever?
coach.hint: Chunk it: No. / Do you have a fever?

items.line_en: No, Dr. I don't think so.

coach.say: No, Dr. I don't think so.
coach.hint: Chunk it: No, / Dr. / I don't think so.

items.line_en: I'll give you a prescription that'll get rid of the infection quickly.

coach.say: I'll give you a prescription that'll get rid of the infection quickly.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I'll give you a prescription that'll get rid of the infection quickly.

items.line_en: Keep the dressing clean by changing it as often as necessary.

coach.say: Keep the dressing clean by changing it as often as necessary.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Keep the dressing clean by changing it as often as necessary.

items.line_en: Keep the wound dry by using waterproof dressings, which will allow you to take showers.

coach.say: Keep the wound dry by using waterproof dressings, which will allow you to take showers.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Keep the wound dry by using waterproof dressings, / which will allow you to take showers.

items.line_en: You can remove the dressing after a few days once the wound has closed itself.

coach.say: You can remove the dressing after a few days once the wound has closed itself.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You can remove the dressing after a few days once the wound has closed itself.

items.line_en: Thank you very much, Dr.

coach.say: Thank you very much, Dr.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Thank you very much, / Dr.

items.line_en: Thanks for watching and make sure you subscribe.

coach.say: Thanks for watching and make sure you subscribe.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Thanks for watching and / make sure you subscribe.

items.line_en: Learn simple English with read animations youTuber channel.

coach.say: Learn simple English with read animations youTuber channel.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Learn simple English with read animations youTuber channel.

items.line_en: And feel free to post any questions.

coach.say: And feel free to post any questions.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And feel free to post any questions.

items.line_en: We are really happy to answer you.

coach.say: We are really happy to answer you.
coach.hint: Chunk it: We are really happy to answer you.

items.line_en: So, see you again with new video.

coach.say: So, see you again with new video.
coach.hint: Chunk it: So, / see you again with new video.

items.line_en: Take care.

coach.say: Take care.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Take care.

items.line_en: Thank you very much.

coach.say: Thank you very much.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Thank you very much.
